caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" and "TALK" printed in gold letters, and a gold watch on his left wrist sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. He gestures with his right hand raised and his left hand resting on a dark table. Behind him, a wall features logos containing the words "URBAN HUSTLE" and a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table to his right sits a black mug with red and white text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". To his left is a black equipment case. The man's expression and posture remain consistent across the sequence, with only slight movements in his facial expression and hand gestures as he continues to speak.
